prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 26246→45538→36596→36912→53826，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025 年基准约 53826 名，近 3 年累计后移约 17230 名，波动幅度较大；该校在广西理科/物理类计划 2021 年 12 人、2022 年 16 人、2023 年 18 人、2024 年 30 人、2025 年 36 人，持续扩招；2026 年计划 37 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 2.78%，扩招对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名 2021 年 170→2022 年 167→2023 年 149→2024 年 128→2025 年 134→2026 年 137，近年排名稳中有升后略回落，整体处于全国中上水平；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及图书馆管理类事件，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 104，评价为"一般"，曝光量较低；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等热门专业 2026 年均有招生，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；土木建筑（分化观望/明显劝退）、食品科学与工程（属生化环材，明显劝退）热度较低；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 26.9 万（按近年比例估算），较 2025 年约 26.0 万增加约 3.3%，竞争加剧；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川，属西北地区，对广西考生存在一定地域距离；该校在广西招生占比约 2.1%–2.4%，属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 53826 名、2026 年计划小幅扩招 2.78%、本省物理类考生增加约 3.3% 以及电气/计算机等热门专业新增招生的吸引力，供需两端均指向竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 54823 名，区间 54323–55323 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 26246 → 45538 → 36596 → 36912 → 53826, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 53826, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17230 over the past 3 years, indicating significant fluctuation. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Guangxi was 12 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 36 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 37, a slight increase of about 2.78% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking: 2021: 170 → 2022: 167 → 2023: 149 → 2024: 128 → 2025: 134 → 2026: 137, showing a stable rise in recent years followed by a slight decline, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 104, rated as 'average', with low exposure. No obvious record of admission gaps. Fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other popular majors are all enrolling in 2026, which may attract more high-scoring candidates. Civil Engineering (differentiated/wait-and-see/clearly discouraged), Food Science and Engineering (belongs to biology, chemistry, environment, materials, clearly discouraged) have lower popularity. The province's 2026 physics category candidates are about 269,000 (estimated based on recent years' proportions), an increase of about 3.3% from about 260,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, in the northwest region, which presents a certain geographical distance for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1%–2.4%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with regional preference having a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 53826, the 2026 plan's slight expansion of 2.78%, the increase of about 3.3% in the province's physics category candidates, and the attractiveness of newly added popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, both supply and demand indicate slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 54823, with a range of 54323–55323.

When ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, focus on reaching for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science.
